description: Forbidden FCA-centric phrases - MUST NOT appear in any messaging update files

forbiddenPhrases.reason: Positions FCA as primary/superior, not global
Sets FCA as the standard for others, not neutral
Implies FCA is the model, not one of many
Implies FCA depth is the measure of value, not global coverage
Individual guide titles OK, but not if all guides are FCA-focused
forbiddenPhrases.context: only restrict if 90%+ of guides are FCA

forbiddenPhrases.reason: Individual article OK, but not if most articles are FCA
forbiddenPhrases.context: only restrict if blog is FCA-dominant

forbiddenPhrases.reason: Featured section should showcase diversity, not FCA exclusively
Positions FCA as the main thing, others as supplementary
Implies FCA is the standard, others are 'lighter'
Meta phrase indicating FCA focus - defeats globalization
Implies FCA is the measure for others

allowedContexts.articleTitles: Can mention specific regulators (e.g., 'FCA Enforcement Guide', 'BaFin Fines 2025')
allowedContexts.multiRegulatorContext: OK to say 'FCA and other regulators' if listing all equally
allowedContexts.historicalReferences: OK to reference 'FCA fines from 2013' in data context, not marketing

testingStrategy.unitTests: Check all source files against phrase list
testingStrategy.e2eTests: Verify rendered HTML/meta tags don't contain phrases
testingStrategy.schemaValidation: JSON-LD structured data must have global focus
testingStrategy.manualReview: Spot-check blog posts and marketing copy
